details: The agent ran kubectl commands against the cluster and correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root-cause categories: fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap), fault-crashloop (app dependency/DB connection failure), fault-endpoints (service selector label mismatch), fault-imagepull (nonexistent image tag), fault-init (init container migration failure), fault-multicontainer (sidecar DNS resolution failure), fault-oom (OOMKilled due to memory limit), fault-pvc (missing StorageClass 'fast-ssd'), fault-readiness (readiness probe wrong port 8080 vs 80), fault-rollout (stuck rolling update with invalid image), fault-unschedulable (unsatisfiable node selector). The healthy namespace was not flagged as broken. All diagnoses are supported by command output evidence.
